typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Counter as integer (),
	FFIsEmpty as boolean (),
	FFNonDataRows as integer (),
	RecentDate as string (),
	Bool as boolean (),
	INT as integer (),
	String as string ()
}

source(output(
		Id as string,
		Name as string,
		Age as short,
		ResourceType as string,
		ExperienceStartDate as date
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> IFILNewJoinees	source(output(
		DeptId as integer,
		FirstName as string,
		LastName as string,
		MgrId as integer,
		joining_date as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	format: 'table',
	staged:false) ~> TBLManager	source(output(
		ID as integer,
		Exp as integer,
		Salary as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from dbo.Salary',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupLKPTABLE
IFILNewJoinees derive(DOJ = toDate(toString(currentDate(), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy"),
		EmpId = toInteger((Id)),
		isFresher = iif(isNull(ExperienceStartDate), 'Y', 'N'),
		ExperienceStartDate = iif(isNull(ExperienceStartDate), toDate(toString(currentDate(), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy"), ExperienceStartDate),
		Name = rtrim(toString(ltrim(toString(Name),' ')),' ')) ~> CalcDoj
TBLManager sort(asc(MgrId, false)) ~> SortMgrId
CalcDoj sort(asc(EmpId, false)) ~> SortEmpId
SortEmpId,SortMgrId join(EmpId == MgrId,
	joinType:'left',
	broadcast: 'none')~> MergeJoin
MergeJoin split(isNull(MgrId) && ResourceType == 'Manager', disjoint: true) ~> FilterNewMgrId@(newmangers,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
MergeJoin derive(Name = Name,
		Age = Age,
		ResourceType = ResourceType,
		ExperienceStartDate = ExperienceStartDate,
		DOJ = DOJ,
		isFresher = isFresher,
		EmpId = EmpId,
		MgrId = MgrId) ~> MergeJoinREFORMAT1
MergeJoinREFORMAT1 derive(experience = year(ExperienceStartDate) - year(DOJ)) ~> CalcExp
FilterNewMgrId@newmangers derive(MgrId = EmpId,
		DeptId = '',
		JoiningDate = DOJ,
		FirstName = toString(Name)) ~> AssignColValues
CalcExp,LookupLKPTABLE lookup(experience == Exp,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookup
AssignColValues sink(input(
		joining_date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		FirstName as string,
		DeptId as integer,
		MgrId as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		joining_date = DOJ,
		FirstName,
		DeptId,
		MgrId = EmpId)) ~> OLEDBDestination
Lookup split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupIsMatch@Match split(experience > 3 && experience <= 6 && ResourceType == 'Developer',greaterOrEqual(experience,0) && experience <= 3 && ResourceType == 'Developer',experience > 6 && ResourceType == 'Developer',ResourceType == 'Manager', disjoint: true) ~> ConditionalSplit@(Analyst,Programmer,Lead,Manager,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
ConditionalSplit@Analyst derive(Training = 'advanced SDLC',
		Manager = toString(''),
		HR = toString('Radx'),
		ENCRYPT = '$***$',
		Position = 'Analyst') ~> AnalystTraining
ConditionalSplit@Programmer derive(Training = 'Basic programming',
		Manager = toString(''),
		HR = toString('Radx'),
		ENCRYPT = '$***$',
		Position = 'Programmer') ~> ProgrammerTraining
ConditionalSplit@Lead derive(Training = 'Effective Teamwork',
		Manager = toString(''),
		HR = toString('Radx'),
		ENCRYPT = '$***$',
		Position = 'Lead') ~> LeadTraining
ProgrammerTraining,AnalystTraining,LeadTraining union(byName: true) ~> UnionAll
UnionAll aggregate(groupBy(Position),
	EmpId = count(EmpId)) ~> Aggregate1
Aggregate1 sink(input(
		Role as string,
		ResourceCount as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		Role = Position,
		ResourceCount = EmpId)) ~> DestFile
